Manages FPGA bitstream data, manufacturing data storage, and related functions.


## Files
- **[boot_fpga.c](boot_fpga.c.md)**: Manages the reading and writing of FPGA bitstream data to a specific flash memory region.
- **[mfg_info.c](mfg_info.c.md)**: Manages manufacturing data storage and retrieval, including model, color, and display offsets.
- **[mfg_private.h](mfg_private.h.md)**: Functions for writing and checking the boot FPGA bitstream status.
